overview.introduction: Observe cloud resources telemetry parameters and configure metric alert rules using Azure Monitor.
overview.why_it_matters: Understanding Azure Monitor allows developers to deploy environments reliably at high speed.
overview.industry_usage: Used by system administrators and platform engineering teams globally.
overview.what_you_will_build: An isolated sandbox folder deploying yaml configurations and targets configs.
overview.prerequisites: Git course and Linux terminal fundamentals.
learning_outcomes: Explain the main concepts of Azure Monitor.
Structure Resource Groups, Virtual Machines, VNets, and Blob Storage Accounts.
Incorporate Azure Monitor, Azure SQL, and Network Security Groups.
Deploy and check state values on target resources.
Adopt clean infrastructure orchestration provisioning workflows.

key_concepts.title: Infrastructure Telemetry Monitoring
key_concepts.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
why_important: Saves manual server setup configuration time.
key_concepts.explanation: Detailed context regarding Azure Monitor. Structuring configurations as code blocks improves change transparency.

commands.name: az
commands.purpose: Execute actions related to Azure Monitor.
commands.output_explanation: Confirms action step for Azure Monitor is processed.

key_concepts.pro_tip: Run configuration validations using dry run configurations flags to verify effects before provisioning targets.
key_concepts.best_practices: Version control your manifests and store credentials securely using environment keys.
key_concepts.common_mistakes: Forgetting firewall port rules configuration causing connection timeout failures.
key_concepts.real_world_usage: Cloud architects design multi-tier secure environments using VNets and Azure VMs.
key_concepts.summary: Azure Monitor configuration forms the building block of secure cloud design.

interactive_examples.scenario: Review local variables settings in workspace.

steps.explanation: Ensure you are in the correct home directory.

interactive_examples.solution: Verify tasks lists details and paths.

lessons.title: 1. Create an Azure Monitor alert rule
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Create an Azure Monitor alert rule is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Configure a high CPU usage alert rule template named devlab-cpu-alert.
lessons.example: az monitor metrics alert create --name devlab-cpu-alert --resource-group devlab-rg
lessons.hint: Check spelling and spacings of your commands carefully.
lessons.solution: az monitor metrics alert create --name devlab-cpu-alert --resource-group devlab-rg

lessons.title: 2. Display system diagnostics
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display system diagnostics is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.hint: Confirm you are in the workspace folder.

lessons.title: 3. List directory contents
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding List directory contents is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Confirm created hosts, templates, or playbooks configurations.
lessons.hint: Run files list to verify existence.

lessons.title: 4. Verify file content displays
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Verify file content displays is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check the configured playbook.yml file content details.
lessons.example: cat playbook.yml || cat main.tf || cat hosts || echo 'file check'
lessons.hint: Verify the configuration files are correctly saved.
lessons.solution: cat playbook.yml || cat main.tf || cat hosts || echo 'file check'

lessons.title: 5. Display Azure account status
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Display Azure account status is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Retrieve description properties for Resource Group configurations.
lessons.hint: Use active resource group list query command.

lessons.title: 6. Query active virtual machines status
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query active virtual machines status is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check list outcomes of configured VM targets.
lessons.hint: Ensure VM list options are run.

lessons.title: 7. Query Storage Accounts state
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Query Storage Accounts state is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Check storage account metadata and active storage lists.
lessons.example: az storage account list || echo 'storage checked'
lessons.hint: Run storage check using az storage account list command.
lessons.solution: az storage account list || echo 'storage checked'

lessons.title: 8. Mini Challenge: Query active alert rules list
lessons.definition: Tracking compute CPU, memory usages, and network latency alert thresholds.
lessons.explanation: Understanding Mini Challenge: Query active alert rules list is critical for configuring this step.
lessons.instruction: Query defined metric alert rules properties using the list subcommand.
lessons.example: az monitor metrics alert list --resource-group devlab-rg
lessons.hint: Complete the mini challenge criteria to validate lesson progress.
lessons.solution: az monitor metrics alert list --resource-group devlab-rg
